lines: Timothy has folded his machine-works form around a single spare shirt.
"The test starts at third bell. My mother packed before I said yes."

choices.label: Let Timothy prepare for the test

lines: "A lathe that turns true, with pay under a city stamp. I want work where a broken finger gets more than a rag."
"I want those things. I also want my mother to stop pretending she packed by mistake."

choices.label: Ask what the test costs if he fails
Let Timothy prepare for the test

lines: "The bed returns to the list and I return to the freight yard with a test score everyone can price."
"Aurelia calls that no penalty. Darius owns a pencil."

choices.label: Let Timothy prepare for the test
